image:image.image:title: Tumang Bali Cooking Class Group Photo in Ubud Rice Fields
image:image.image:caption: Happy guests enjoying authentic Balinese cooking class experience with local chefs in Ubud

image:image.image:title: Hands-on Cooking - Chopping Fresh Ingredients
image:image.image:caption: Guests chopping fresh ingredients for traditional Balinese spice paste during cooking class

image:image.image:title: Traditional Satay Grilling on Coconut Husk Charcoal
image:image.image:caption: Cooking authentic Balinese satay on traditional coconut husk charcoal at Tumang Bali

image:image.image:title: Balinese Cultural Experience with Canang Sari Offerings
image:image.image:caption: Guests holding traditional Balinese flower offerings at temple during cooking class experience

image:image.image:title: Chef and Guests Enjoying Cooking Class
image:image.image:caption: Local chefs and guests giving thumbs up after successful Balinese cooking class in Ubud
